agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: Create and manage intelligent automation agents

typeDescriptions.support: Handle customer support inquiries and issues
typeDescriptions.sales: Assist with sales outreach and follow-ups
typeDescriptions.scheduling: Manage meeting scheduling and calendar coordination
typeDescriptions.onboarding: Guide new users through onboarding processes
typeDescriptions.recruiting: Assist with candidate outreach and screening
typeDescriptions.triage: Classify and route incoming tickets by priority and department
typeDescriptions.insights: Proactively surface team metrics, burnout risks, and performance trends
typeDescriptions.standup: Draft standup summaries from activity and remind team members
typeDescriptions.custom: Build a custom agent with your own configuration

detail.selectExecutionToView: Select an execution to view details

runDialog.title: Run {agentName}
runDialog.taskPlaceholder: e.g., Search for contacts in the tech industry and draft a personalized email...
runDialog.taskHelp: Be specific about what you want the agent to do. The agent will use its available tools to complete the task.

wizard.configureToolsDescription: Set up what your agent can do

empty.noAgentsDescription: Create AI agents to automate email responses, schedule meetings, manage CRM data, and more.
empty.noAgentsFoundDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters
empty.agentNotFoundDescription: The agent you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.

confirmations.deleteAgentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.deleteAgentDescription: Conversations, configuration, and execution history will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
confirmations.deleteConversationDescription: The conversation thread and all messages will be removed.

chat.generatePromptPlaceholder: e.g. When a new deal closes in CRM, post to Slack and create a follow-up task
